title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
